### specifically dependent continuant `http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/BFO_0000020`

#### Added
- Class: [specifically dependent continuant](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/BFO_0000020) 

- [specifically dependent continuant](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/BFO_0000020) [example of usage](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000112) "Reciprocal specifically dependent continuants: the function of this key to open this lock and the mutually dependent disposition of this lock: to be opened by this key"@en 

- [specifically dependent continuant](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/BFO_0000020) [example of usage](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000112) "of one-sided specifically dependent continuants: the mass of this tomato"@en 

- [specifically dependent continuant](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/BFO_0000020) [example of usage](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000112) "of relational dependent continuants (multiple bearers): John&rsquo;s love for Mary, the ownership relation between John and this statue, the relation of authority between John and his subordinates."@en 

- [specifically dependent continuant](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/BFO_0000020) [example of usage](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000112) "the disposition of this fish to decay"@en 

- [specifically dependent continuant](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/BFO_0000020) [example of usage](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000112) "the function of this heart: to pump blood"@en 

- [specifically dependent continuant](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/BFO_0000020) [example of usage](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000112) "the mutual dependence of proton donors and acceptors in chemical reactions [79"@en 

- [specifically dependent continuant](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/BFO_0000020) [example of usage](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000112) "the mutual dependence of the role predator and the role prey as played by two organisms in a given interaction"@en 

- [specifically dependent continuant](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/BFO_0000020) [example of usage](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000112) "the pink color of a medium rare piece of grilled filet mignon at its center"@en 

- [specifically dependent continuant](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/BFO_0000020) [example of usage](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000112) "the role of being a doctor"@en 

- [specifically dependent continuant](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/BFO_0000020) [example of usage](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000112) "the shape of this hole."@en 

- [specifically dependent continuant](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/BFO_0000020) [example of usage](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000112) "the smell of this portion of mozzarella"@en 

- [specifically dependent continuant](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/BFO_0000020) [textual definition](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000115) "b is a specifically dependent continuant = Def. b is a continuant &amp; there is some independent continuant c which is not a spatial region and which is such that b s-depends_on c at every time t during the course of b&rsquo;s existence. (axiom label in BFO2 Reference: [050-003])"@en 

- [specifically dependent continuant](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/BFO_0000020) [label](http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label) "specifically dependent continuant"@en 

- [specifically dependent continuant](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/BFO_0000020) DisjointWith [generically dependent continuant](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/BFO_0000031) 

- [specifically dependent continuant](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/BFO_0000020) SubClassOf [continuant](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/BFO_0000002) 

- [specifically dependent continuant](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/BFO_0000020) SubClassOf [part of](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/BFO_0000050) only [specifically dependent continuant](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/BFO_0000020) 


### specimen `http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/OBI_0100051`

#### Added
- Class: [specimen](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/OBI_0100051) 

- [specimen](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/OBI_0100051) [textual definition](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000115) "A material entity that is collected for potential use as an input upon which measurements or observations are performed."@en 

- [specimen](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/OBI_0100051) [term editor](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000117) "PERSON: James Malone" 

- [specimen](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/OBI_0100051) [term editor](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000117) "PERSON: Philippe Rocca-Serra" 

- [specimen](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/OBI_0100051) [label](http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label) "specimen"@en 

- [specimen](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/OBI_0100051) EquivalentTo [material entity](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/BFO_0000040) and ([has role](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/RO_0000087) some [specimen role](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/OBI_0000112)) 

- [specimen](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/OBI_0100051) SubClassOf [material entity](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/BFO_0000040) 

- [specimen](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/OBI_0100051) SubClassOf [has role](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/RO_0000087) some [specimen role](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/OBI_0000112) 


### specimen collection objective `http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/OBI_0000684`

#### Added
- Class: [specimen collection objective](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/OBI_0000684) 

- [specimen collection objective](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/OBI_0000684) [textual definition](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000115) "A objective specification that is fulfilled by obtaining a material entity for potential use as an input upon which measurements or observations are performed."@en 

- [specimen collection objective](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/OBI_0000684) [term editor](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000117) "Bjoern Peters" 

- [specimen collection objective](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/OBI_0000684) [label](http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label) "specimen collection objective" 

- [specimen collection objective](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/OBI_0000684) SubClassOf [objective specification](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000005) 


### specimen collection process `http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/OBI_0000659`

#### Added
- Class: [specimen collection process](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/OBI_0000659) 

- [specimen collection process](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/OBI_0000659) [textual definition](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000115) "A planned process with the objective to obtain a material entity for potential use as an input upon which measurements or observations are performed."@en 

- [specimen collection process](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/OBI_0000659) [term editor](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000117) "Bjoern Peters" 

- [specimen collection process](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/OBI_0000659) [label](http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label) "specimen collection process" 

- [specimen collection process](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/OBI_0000659) EquivalentTo [completely executed planned process](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/COB_0000035) and ([achieves_planned_objective](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/OBI_0000417) some [specimen collection objective](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/OBI_0000684)) 

- [specimen collection process](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/OBI_0000659) SubClassOf [completely executed planned process](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/COB_0000035) 

- [specimen collection process](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/OBI_0000659) SubClassOf [has specified input](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/OBI_0000293) some [material entity](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/BFO_0000040) 

- [specimen collection process](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/OBI_0000659) SubClassOf [has specified output](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/OBI_0000299) some [specimen](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/OBI_0100051) 

- [specimen collection process](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/OBI_0000659) SubClassOf [achieves_planned_objective](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/OBI_0000417) some [specimen collection objective](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/OBI_0000684) 


### specimen from organism `http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/OBI_0001479`

#### Added
- Class: [specimen from organism](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/OBI_0001479) 

- [specimen from organism](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/OBI_0001479) [textual definition](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000115) "A specimen that derives from an anatomical part or substance arising from an organism. Examples of tissue specimen include tissue, organ, physiological system, blood, or body location (arm)."@en 

- [specimen from organism](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/OBI_0001479) [term editor](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000117) "PERSON: Chris Stoeckert, Jie Zheng" 

- [specimen from organism](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/OBI_0001479) [label](http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label) "specimen from organism" 

- [specimen from organism](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/OBI_0001479) EquivalentTo [specimen](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/OBI_0100051) and ([is specified output of](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/OBI_0000312) some 
([specimen collection process](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/OBI_0000659) and ([has specified input](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/OBI_0000293) some 
([organism](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/COB_0000022) or [material anatomical entity](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/UBERON_0000465) or [anatomical cluster](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/UBERON_0000477))))) 

- [specimen from organism](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/OBI_0001479) SubClassOf [specimen](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/OBI_0100051) 

- [specimen from organism](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/OBI_0001479) SubClassOf [is specified output of](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/OBI_0000312) some 
([specimen collection process](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/OBI_0000659) and ([has specified input](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/OBI_0000293) some 
([organism](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/COB_0000022) or [material anatomical entity](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/UBERON_0000465) or [anatomical cluster](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/UBERON_0000477)))) 


### specimen role `http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/OBI_0000112`

#### Added
- Class: [specimen role](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/OBI_0000112) 

- [specimen role](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/OBI_0000112) [textual definition](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000115) "A role borne by a material entity that is obtained during a specimen collection process and that can be realized by performing measurements or observations on the specimen."@en 

- [specimen role](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/OBI_0000112) [term editor](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000117) "GROUP:  Role Branch" 

- [specimen role](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/OBI_0000112) [label](http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label) "specimen role"@en

### textual definition `http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000115`

#### Added
- AnnotationProperty: [textual definition](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000115) 

- [textual definition](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000115) [editor preferred term](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000111) "definition"@en 

- [textual definition](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000115) [has curation status](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000114) [ready for release](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000122) 

- [textual definition](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000115) [textual definition](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000115) "A property representing the English language definitions of what NCI means by the concept. They may also include information about the definition's source and attribution in a form that can easily be interpreted by software." 

- [textual definition](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000115) [textual definition](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000115) "English language definitions of what NCI means by the concept. These are limited to 1024 characters. They may also include information about the definition's source and attribution in a form that can easily be interpreted by software." 

- [textual definition](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000115) [textual definition](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000115) "The official OBI definition, explaining the meaning of a class or property. Shall be Aristotelian, formalized and normalized. Can be augmented with colloquial definitions."@en 

- [textual definition](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000115) [textual definition](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000115) "The official definition, explaining the meaning of a class or property. Shall be Aristotelian, formalized and normalized. Can be augmented with colloquial definitions."@en 

- [textual definition](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000115) [textual definition](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000115) "The official definition." 

- [textual definition](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000115) [editor note](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000116) "2012-04-05: 
Barry Smith

The official OBI definition, explaining the meaning of a class or property: 'Shall be Aristotelian, formalized and normalized. Can be augmented with colloquial definitions'  is terrible.

Can you fix to something like:

A statement of necessary and sufficient conditions explaining the meaning of an expression referring to a class or property.

Alan Ruttenberg

Your proposed definition is a reasonable candidate, except that it is very common that necessary and sufficient conditions are not given. Mostly they are necessary, occasionally they are necessary and sufficient or just sufficient. Often they use terms that are not themselves defined and so they effectively can't be evaluated by those criteria. 

On the specifics of the proposed definition:

We don't have definitions of 'meaning' or 'expression' or 'property'. For 'reference' in the intended sense I think we use the term 'denotation'. For 'expression', I think we you mean symbol, or identifier. For 'meaning' it differs for class and property. For class we want documentation that let's the intended reader determine whether an entity is instance of the class, or not. For property we want documentation that let's the intended reader determine, given a pair of potential relata, whether the assertion that the relation holds is true. The 'intended reader' part suggests that we also specify who, we expect, would be able to understand the definition, and also generalizes over human and computer reader to include textual and logical definition. 

Personally, I am more comfortable weakening definition to documentation, with instructions as to what is desirable. 

We also have the outstanding issue of how to aim different definitions to different audiences. A clinical audience reading chebi wants a different sort of definition documentation/definition from a chemistry trained audience, and similarly there is a need for a definition that is adequate for an ontologist to work with."@en 

- [textual definition](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000115) [term editor](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000117) "PERSON:Daniel Schober"@en 

- [textual definition](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000115) [definition source](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000119) "GROUP:OBI:&lt;http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/obi&gt;"@en 

- [textual definition](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000115) [label](http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label) "definition" 

- [textual definition](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000115) [label](http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label) "definition"@en 

- [textual definition](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000115) [label](http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label) "textual definition"

- Class: [tolerable daily intake](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/PBPKO_00284) 

- [tolerable daily intake](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/PBPKO_00284) [textual definition](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000115) "An output parameter (or exposure limit) estimating the amount of a substance that can be ingested daily over a lifetime without appreciable health risk (TDI)." 

- [tolerable daily intake](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/PBPKO_00284) [term editor](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000117) "0000-0001-8345-1349" 

- [tolerable daily intake](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/PBPKO_00284) [term editor](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000117) "0000-0002-9795-5967" 

- [tolerable daily intake](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/PBPKO_00284) [has_synonym_type](http://www.geneontology.org/formats/oboInOwl#hasSynonymType) "tdi" 

- [tolerable daily intake](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/PBPKO_00284) [label](http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label) "tolerable daily intake" 

- [tolerable daily intake](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/PBPKO_00284) SubClassOf [output parameter](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/PBPKO_00252) 


### top well diameter `http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/PBPKO_03061`

#### Added
- Class: [top well diameter](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/PBPKO_03061) 

- [top well diameter](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/PBPKO_03061) [label](http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label) "top well diameter" 

- [top well diameter](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/PBPKO_03061) SubClassOf [biochemical parameter](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/PBPKO_00139) 


### top-down pbpk `http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/PBPKO_00317`

#### Added
- Class: [top-down pbpk](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/PBPKO_00317) 

- [top-down pbpk](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/PBPKO_00317) [textual definition](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000115) "A physiologically based pharmacokinetic model approach primarily based on fitting observed clinical data, often empirical." 

- [top-down pbpk](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/PBPKO_00317) [term editor](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000117) "0000-0001-8345-1349" 

- [top-down pbpk](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/PBPKO_00317) [term editor](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000117) "0000-0002-9795-5967" 

- [top-down pbpk](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/PBPKO_00317) [label](http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label) "top-down pbpk" 

- [top-down pbpk](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/PBPKO_00317) SubClassOf [physiologically based pharmacokinetic model](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/PBPKO_00003) 

- [top-down pbpk](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/PBPKO_00317) SubClassOf [PBPKO_10001](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/PBPKO_10001) some [excretion](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/GO_0007588)

### universal `http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000410`

#### Added
- Individual: [universal](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000410) 

- [universal](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000410) [editor preferred term](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000111) "universal"@en 

- [universal](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000410) [editor note](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000116) "Hard to give a definition for. Intuitively a &quot;natural kind&quot; rather than a collection of any old things, which a class is able to be, formally. At the meta level, universals are defined as positives, are disjoint with their siblings, have single asserted parents."@en 

- [universal](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000410) [term editor](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000117) "Alan Ruttenberg"@en 

- [universal](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000410) [definition source](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000119) "A Formal Theory of Substances, Qualities, and Universals, http://ontology.buffalo.edu/bfo/SQU.pdf"@en 

- [universal](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000410) [label](http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label) "universal"@en 

- [universal](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000410) Type [denotator type](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000409)

- Class: [whole body pbpk](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/PBPKO_00004) 

- [whole body pbpk](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/PBPKO_00004) [textual definition](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000115) "A physiologically based pharmacokinetic model that contains an explicit representation of the organs most relevant to the ADME of the compound." 

- [whole body pbpk](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/PBPKO_00004) [term editor](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000117) "0000-0001-8345-1349"

- [whole body pbpk](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/PBPKO_00004) [label](http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label) "whole body pbpk"

- [whole body pbpk](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/PBPKO_00004) SubClassOf [PBPKO_10009](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/PBPKO_10009) some [ocular exposure](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/PBPKO_00251) 


### year `http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/UO_0000036`

#### Added
- Individual: [year](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/UO_0000036) 

- [year](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/UO_0000036) [textual definition](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000115) "A time unit which is equal to 12 months which is science is taken to be equal to 365.25 days." 

- [year](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/UO_0000036) [label](http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label) "year" 

- [year](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/UO_0000036) Type [time unit](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/UO_0000003)
